statement.en: Lean 4 progress: Devissage — 6 theorems/lemmas, 0 sorry, 0 axiom
statement.ja: Lean 4 進捗: Devissage — 定理 6 / sorry 0 / axiom 0
statement.headerDoc:
Abstract Dévissage Lemma — Lean 4 Zero-Sorry Formalization
  ============================================================

  Motivation: closes the abstract / well-foundedness portion of a
  dévissage formalization (Rei-AIOS STEP 881, 2026-04-19). Accompanies
  Roshanak-sensei's note article on dévissage
  (https://note.com/nifty_godwit2635/n/n3c70baa9f3b2) which declared 5
  sorries remaining in a Noetherian-scheme-specific treatment.

  Rei contribution here: the *abstract* dévissage theorem (category-free,
  scheme-free) is proven ZERO-SORRY via strong well-founded induction
  on a lexicogr

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Zero-sorry verified by lake env lean
